README cookbook recipe demonstrating 'attendee timeline' with a synthetic example address; uses RFC 6761 reserved example.com TLD.
README Unique Features block teaching 'attendee timeline' usage; RFC 6761 example.com TLD.
README Unique Features block teaching 'attendee brief' usage; RFC 6761 example.com TLD.
SKILL recipe block for attendee timeline — the SKILL teaches agents to substitute the user's real attendee email at runtime.
SKILL recipe block for attendee brief — placeholder for the user's real attendee, swapped by the agent at runtime.
SKILL recipe demonstrating cross-meeting attendee query format; swapped at runtime.
Test fixture seeds an in-memory SQLite store with a synthetic attendee row; RFC 6761 example.com TLD reserved for documentation.
